description_long: This is a modern, dark-colored desk with a sleek, angular design and a flat rectangular work surface. The desk features two side panels that rise slightly above the main surface, creating a subtle enclosure at the back and sides. The front edge is straight and open, providing easy access for a seated user, while the back edge has a small central cutout, likely for cable management. The legs are constructed in a crisscross pattern, giving the desk a contemporary and sturdy appearance. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with no visible drawers or additional storage compartments. The minimalist design suggests it is intended for functional use in a stylish urban environment.
description: A sleek, modern desk with a dark finish, angular side panels, and crisscross legs. It features a central cable cutout and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open access, angular side panels, and central cable cutout at the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the raised side panel and the crisscross leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the desk, the back enclosure, and the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the raised side panel and crisscross leg design.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the open front edge, with the raised side panels and cable cutout at the back indicating the rear. The crisscross legs are symmetrically positioned on both sides.
